aka: Everyday It Gets A Little Easier‎

cast.name: 德尼兹·塞利洛格卢 Deniz Celiloglu
多加·卡拉卡斯 Doga Karakas

director.name: 恰厄尔·博库特 Çağıl Bocut

trans_title: Everyday It Gets A Little Easier‎
introduction: Seventeen year old Cemre has been preparing for the provincial swimming team for years. After a good workout, her trainer advises her to go easy on herself, eat well and get a good night’s sleep before the race. However, Cemre's efforts to spare time for her high school exams, boyfriend and family will not make it possible for her to follow her trainer’s advice. After a sleepless night, Cemre is late for the competition due to a traumatic incident. Nevertheless, her attitude towards this incident will also be unexpected.源自：https://www.antalyaff.com/en/movies/nationalshortfilm/23/302
